name: formaldehyde_vibrational_analysis
prompt: Run the vibrational-analysis task on formaldehyde using the PM7 (mopac) method in the gas phase. Do NOT perform a pre-optimization — pass --no-preopt so the Hessian is taken on the supplied geometry as-is. Report the electronic energy in eV as the headline value (the vibrational-analysis task also returns the enthalpy and the Gibbs free energy, both in eV — do NOT report those as the headline value), state the method used, and surface any warnings the calculation produced about PM7 parameter coverage. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number. Use charge 0 and multiplicity 1.
